Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO ENVIRONMENTAL CONSERVATION

Title: Enacts the Mohawk River Basin management act
Summary: Establishes a Mohawk River Basin district and Mohawk River Basin management program for management of such district to preserve, protect, restore and enhance the environmental quality of the Mohawk River.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the environmental conservation law, in relation to enacting the "Mohawk River Basin management act"
